scripts.check:syntax: find src -name '*.mjs' -exec node --check {} \; && find test -name '*.test.mjs' -exec node --check {} \;
scripts.check:imports: node -e 'Promise.all([import("./src/state-store.mjs"), import("./src/task-lifecycle.mjs"), import("./src/goal-files.mjs"), import("./src/goal-lifecycle.mjs"), import("./src/goal-task-lifecycle.mjs"), import("./src/diagnostics-service.mjs"), import("./src/codex-run-metadata.mjs"), import("./src/worker-queue-counts.mjs"), import("./src/goal-queue.mjs"), import("./src/tool-groups/goal-queue-tools-group.mjs"), import("./src/goal-storage-service.mjs"), import("./src/gptwork-tmp.mjs"), import("./src/admin-audit-log.mjs"), import("./src/tool-groups/recovery-tools-group.mjs")]).then(() => console.log("imports ok")).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })'
scripts.release:check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:imports && npm run test:e2e-acceptance
